name: Alexandria Area High School
description: Alexandria Area High School is a place to play pickleball in Alexandria, MN. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Alexandria Area YMCA
description: Alexandria Area YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Alexandria, MN. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include lights.

name: Alexandria City Park
description: Alexandria City Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Alexandria, MN. There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Andes Rv Park
description: Andes Rv Park is a place to play pickleball in Alexandria, MN. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms. Reservations are available. The courts are private.
fees: Private — $5 Fee to use the pickleball court.

name: Discovery Middle School
description: Come play pickleball at Discovery Middle School in Alexandria, MN! There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Forada Community Pickleball Courts
description: Forada Community Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Alexandria, MN. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: The Blind Squirrel Pickleball Club
description:
We are a private club that is open to the public.  We have a annual membership fee of $25.00 and then each member pays an hourly rate to play.  We offer two temperature controlled courts that are fully netted so there are no cross balls or "Ball On" yelled from opposing court.  We also offer free lessons to new members.  
Please text BSPC to Brock @ 760-305-3734 for membership information.
open_play_schedule: Scheduled play through Court Reserve App
